query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS advisory_report_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reportId INT NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  changeLog TEXT,
  createdBy VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX reportId_idx (reportId)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS advisory_report_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reportId INT NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  changeLog TEXT,
  createdBy VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX reportId_idx (reportId)
)
